protein_name: Tyrosine kinase substrate that inhibits growth-factor-mediated activation of MAP kinase. Negatively regulates hematopoiesis of bone marrow. Weakly expressed in embryonic cell line HEK293. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Molecular Function: phosphatase binding; protein binding; protein kinase binding; protein serine/threonine kinase inhibitor activity; stem cell factor receptor binding
